statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY $OrderField$ $OrderField_ASC_DESC$) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.PostType, a.PostTo, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120) AS PostDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120) AS PostDateE, a.PostCaption, a.PublishedUnit, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MsgPost a WHERE ISNULL(a.Actived,'Y')!='N' AND a.PostTo<=2
AND a.PostType = #PostType# AND a.PostTo = #PostTo# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 112) >= #PostDateS_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 112) <= #PostDateS_B# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 112) >= #PostDateE_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 112) <= #PostDateE_B# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 112) >= #UpdatedDatetime_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 112) <= #UpdatedDatetime_B# AND a.PostCaption + CAST(a.PostContent AS nvarchar(4000)) LIKE '%' + #KeyWord# + '%'
ORDER BY $OrderField$ $OrderField_ASC_DESC$

SELECT a.Seq, a.PostType, a.PostCaption, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120) AS PostDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120) AS PostDateE, a.PostTo, a.PostContent, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.IsOnTop, a.IsShowSignUp, a.MeetingSeq, b.MeetingName AS MeetingSeq_Name, a.PublishedUnit, a.OrderBy, a.Actived, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MsgPost a LEFT JOIN Meeting b ON a.MeetingSeq=b.Seq WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MsgPostSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MsgPostAttached a WHERE a.MsgPostSeq=#Seq#
statements.update: UPDATE MsgPost SET PostType = #PostType#, PostCaption = #PostCaption#, PostDateS = #PostDateS#, PostDateE = #PostDateE#, PostTo = #PostTo#, PostContent = #PostContent#, FileNameOrg = #FileNameOrg#, FileNameNew = #FileNameNew#, IsOnTop = #IsOnTop#, IsShowSignUp = #IsShowSignUp#, MeetingSeq = #MeetingSeq#, PublishedUnit = #PublishedUnit#, OrderBy = #OrderBy#, Actived = #Actived#, UpdatedAccount = #UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime = #UpdatedDatetime# WHERE Seq=#Seq#
UPDATE MsgPost SET Actived='N', UpdatedAccount=#UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime=GETDATE() WHERE Seq=#Seq#
statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Year, a.UnitCode) AS ROWID, a.Year, a.UnitCode, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateS, 120) AS DateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateE, 120) AS DateE, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Report a WHERE a.UnitCode=#UnitCode#
AND a.Year = #Year#
ORDER BY a.Year, a.UnitCode

SELECT a.Year, a.UnitCode, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateS, 120) AS DateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateE, 120) AS DateE, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Report a WHERE a.Year=#Year# AND a.UnitCode=#UnitCode#
statements.insert: INSERT INTO Report(Year, UnitCode, DateS, DateE, UpdatedAccount, UpdatedDatetime) VALUES(#Year#, #UnitCode#, #DateS#, #DateE#, #UpdatedAccount#, #UpdatedDatetime#)
statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UnitCode, a.TeacherName) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Teacher a LEFT JOIN Edu b ON a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel WHERE 1=1
AND a.Email LIKE '%' + #Email# + '%' AND a.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%' AND a.IDNO = #IDNO#
AND ( ISNULL(a.TeacherName,'') + ',' + ISNULL(a.TeacherEName,'') + ',' + ISNULL(CAST(a.ExpertiseDesc AS NVARCHAR),'') + (SELECT ',' + bb.ExpertiseName FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(a.ExpertiseCode,''), ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) ) LIKE '%' + #Keyword# + '%'
AND a.TeachJobAbility$TeachUnit_forSQL$ = 'Y'
AND ( SELECT COUNT(bb.value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachArea,',') aa LEFT JOIN STRING_SPLIT(#TeachArea_forSQL#,',') bb ON '%' + aa.value + '%' LIKE '%' + bb.value + '%' )>0
AND ( SELECT COUNT(aa.value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#LiveArea_forSQL#,',') aa WHERE a.Address LIKE '%' + aa.value + '%' )>0
AND ( SELECT COUNT(aa.IndustryMstCode) FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) AND aa.IndustryMstCode=#Industry# )>0
ORDER BY a.UnitCode, a.TeacherName

SELECT a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, (select b.EduName from Edu b WHERE a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel) AS EduLevelHighest_Name, (select c1.EduName from Edu c1 WHERE a.EduLevel1=c1.EduLevel) AS EduLevel1_Name, (select c2.EduName from Edu c2 WHERE a.EduLevel2=c2.EduLevel) AS EduLevel2_Name, (select c3.EduName from Edu c3 WHERE a.EduLevel3=c3.EduLevel) AS EduLevel3_Name, (SELECT bb.ExpertiseName + ',' FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.ExpertiseCode, ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS Expertise_Str, (SELECT aa.IndustryName + ',' FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) FOR XML PATH('')) AS IndustryStr, a.IndustryAcademicType, a.ServiceUnitProperties, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_DC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_DC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_DC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_DC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_BC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_BC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_BC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_BC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_KC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_KC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_KC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_KC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_TOTAL,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_TOTAL, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_DC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_DC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_DC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_DC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_BC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_BC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_BC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_BC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_KC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_KC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_KC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_KC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_TOTAL,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_TOTAL FROM Teacher a LEFT JOIN ReviewReport r1 ON r1.Year=cast(Year(GETDATE())-1 as varchar(4)) and r1.IDNO=a.IDNO LEFT JOIN ReviewReport r2 ON r2.Year=cast(Year(GETDATE()) as varchar(4)) and r2.IDNO=a.IDNO WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT a.IndustryMstCode AS MSTID, a.IndustryCode AS DETID, b.IndustryName AS MSTNAME, a.IndustryName AS DETNAME FROM IndustryDet a LEFT JOIN IndustryMst b ON a.IndustryMstCode=b.IndustryCode WHERE a.Actived='Y' AND b.Actived='Y' ORDER BY a.OrderBy, b.OrderBy

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.TeacherAccount, a.ReportType, a.JobAbilityCode, a.ReportName, a.FileNameRemark, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.Year, a.AuditStatus, a.AuditAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, b.TeacherName, b.TeacherEName FROM ReportRecord a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE a.ReportType='1' AND a.AuditStatus<>' '
AND b.UnitCode = #UnitCode# AND a.Year = #Year# AND concat(b.TeacherName,b.TeacherEName) LIKE concat('%',#Teacher_Name#,'%') AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 112) >= #FirstTime_S# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 112) <= #FirstTime_E# AND a.AuditStatus = #AuditStatus#
ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC

SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, CAST(CAST(a.Year AS INT)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) AS YearName, a.TeacherAccount, b.TeacherName, b.TeacherEName, b.UnitCode, a.ReportType, a.JobAbilityCode, c.JobAbilityCode + ' ' + c.JobAbilityName AS JobAbilityName, a.ReportName, a.FileNameRemark, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.AuditStatus, NULL AS AuditStatus_New, a.AuditAccount, e.USERNAME AS AuditName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, f.USERNAME AS UpdatedName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM ReportRecord a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN JobAbility c ON a.JobAbilityCode=c.JobAbilityCode /*LEFT JOIN Report d ON a.Year=d.Year AND b.UnitCode=d.UnitCode*/ LEFT JOIN AMDBURM e ON a.AuditAccount=e.USERNO LEFT JOIN AMDBURM f ON a.UpdatedAccount=f.USERNO WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.TeacherAccount, a.JobAbilityCode, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.Year, a.AuditStatus, a.AuditAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, b.TeacherName FROM SelfReport a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE ISNULL(a.AuditStatus,'')<>'' AND a.AuditStatus<>' '
AND a.UnitCode = #UnitCode# AND a.Year = #Year# AND concat(b.TeacherName,b.TeacherEName) LIKE concat('%',#Teacher_Name#,'%') AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 112) >= #FirstTime_S# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 112) <= #FirstTime_E# AND a.AuditStatus = #AuditStatus#
ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC

SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, CAST(CAST(a.Year AS INT)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) AS YearName, a.TeacherAccount, b.TeacherName/*, b.TeacherEName*/, a.UnitCode, a.JobAbilityCode, c.JobAbilityCode + ' ' + c.JobAbilityName AS JobAbilityName, a.CourseUnitCode, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.AuditStatus, NULL AS AuditStatus_New, a.AuditAccount, e.USERNAME AS AuditName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, f.USERNAME AS UpdatedName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, a.OBJECT_TYPE, a.StudNum, a.TObject, a.TMethod, a.TslidesOrg, a.TslidesNew, a.TslidesType, a.Other, a.StudyGReportOrg, a.StudyGReportNew, a.StudyGReportType, a.WorksheetsOrg, a.WorksheetsNew, a.WorksheetsType, a.HomeWorkOrg, a.HomeWorkNew, a.HomeWorkType, a.ExpReportOrg, a.ExpReportNew, a.ExpReportType, a.ExamOrg, a.ExamNew, a.ExamType, a.Other1Org, a.Other1New, a.Other1Type, a.Other1Remark, a.Other2Org, a.Other2New, a.Other2Type, a.Other2Remark, a.Effect, a.PlanImprove, a.ExamImprove, a.materialsImprove, a.Other3 FROM SelfReport a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN JobAbility c ON a.JobAbilityCode=c.JobAbilityCode LEFT JOIN AMDBURM e ON a.AuditAccount=e.USERNO LEFT JOIN AMDBURM f ON a.UpdatedAccount=f.USERNO WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY tmp.UpdatedDatetime DESC, tmp.UnitCode) AS ROWID, * FROM ( SELECT a.Year, a.PlanCode, a.PlanID, a.PlanID AS TrainID, '' AS ClassID, '1' AS PlanTypeCode,'大專就業學程' AS PlanTypeText, a.UnitCode, a.UnitName, a.TeacherID, a.TeacherName, a.SchoolName AS ApplyUnit, a.SchoolName AS TrainingUnit, a.ClassName, a.TrainingDateS, a.TrainingDateE, a.ClassDateS, a.ClassDateE, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.TeachHours, a.TeachNum, a.QuestLink,a.QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(nvarchar(10),null) TrainingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, CAST(CAST( CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(( CAST(ISNULL(Q1 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q2 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q3 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q4 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q5 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+ CAST(ISNULL(Q6 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q7 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q8 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q9 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q10,'0') AS FLOAT)+ CAST(ISNULL(Q11,'0') AS FLOAT) )/11>=4,1,0)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) / CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT)*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) AS Satisfy, CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) AS FillStudentNum FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE 1=1
AND a.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode=#LoginUnit# AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=a.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=#Year# AND a.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND a.SchoolName LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND a.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND a.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND a.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
UNION ALL SELECT b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID, b.ClassID, '2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText, b.UnitCode, b.UnitName, b.TeacherID, b.TeacherName, b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit, b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit, b.ClassName, b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS, b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE, b.ClassDateS, b.ClassDateE, b.JobAbilityCode, b.CourseUnitCode, b.TeachHours, b.TeachNum, b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink, b.TrainingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_AM_S(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) Satisfy, dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_AM_S(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_S_Class b WHERE 1=1
AND b.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode=#LoginUnit# AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND b.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
UNION ALL SELECT b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID,convert(nvarchar(50),b.ClassID) ClassID, '3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText, b.UnitCode, b.UnitName, b.TeacherID, b.TeacherName, b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit, b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit, b.ClassName, b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS, b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE, b.ClassDateS, b.ClassDateE, b.JobAbilityCode, b.CourseUnitCode, b.TeachHours, b.TeachNum, b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink, b.TrainingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_AM_K(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) Satisfy, dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_AM_K(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_K_Class b WHERE 1=1
AND b.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode=#LoginUnit# AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND b.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
) tmp ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY tmp.UpdatedDatetime DESC, tmp.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UpdatedDatetime DESC, a.UnitCode) AS ROWID, a.Year, a.PlanCode, a.PlanID, a.PlanID AS TrainID, '' AS ClassID, '1' AS PlanTypeCode,'大專就業學程' AS PlanTypeText, a.UnitCode, a.UnitName, a.TeacherID, a.TeacherName, a.SchoolName AS ApplyUnit, a.SchoolName AS TrainingUnit, a.ClassName, a.TrainingDateS, a.TrainingDateE, a.ClassDateS, a.ClassDateE, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.TeachHours, a.TeachNum, a.QuestLink,a.QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(nvarchar(10),null) TrainingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, CAST(CAST( CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(( CAST(ISNULL(Q1 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q2 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q3 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q4 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q5 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+ CAST(ISNULL(Q6 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q7 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q8 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q9 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q10,'0') AS FLOAT)+ CAST(ISNULL(Q11,'0') AS FLOAT) )/11>=4,1,0)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) / CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT)*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) AS Satisfy, CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) AS FillStudentNum FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE 1=1
AND a.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode=#LoginUnit# AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=a.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=#Year# AND a.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND a.SchoolName LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND a.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND a.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND a.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UpdatedDatetime DESC, a.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode) AS ROWID, b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID, b.ClassID, '2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText, b.UnitCode, b.UnitName, b.TeacherID, b.TeacherName, b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit, b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit, b.ClassName, b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS, b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE, b.ClassDateS, b.ClassDateE, b.JobAbilityCode, b.CourseUnitCode, b.TeachHours, b.TeachNum, b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink, b.TrainingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_AM_S(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) Satisfy, dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_AM_S(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_S_Class b WHERE 1=1
AND b.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode=#LoginUnit# AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND b.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode) AS ROWID, b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID,convert(nvarchar(50),b.ClassID) ClassID, '3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText, b.UnitCode, b.UnitName, b.TeacherID, b.TeacherName, b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit, b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit, b.ClassName, b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS, b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE, b.ClassDateS, b.ClassDateE, b.JobAbilityCode, b.CourseUnitCode, b.TeachHours, b.TeachNum, b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink, b.TrainingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_AM_K(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) Satisfy, dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_AM_K(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_K_Class b WHERE 1=1
AND b.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode=#LoginUnit# AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND b.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode)

/* '1' AS PlanTypeCode, '大專就業學程' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT Year /*PK*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(ClassDateS,11,2)) ACYear ,PlanCode ,UnitCode ,UnitName ,PlanID /*PK*/ ,SchoolName ,ClassName ,TrainingDateS ,TrainingDateE ,ClassDateS ,ClassDateE ,TeacherID /*PK*/ ,TeacherName ,JobAbilityCode ,CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,TeachHours ,TeachNum ,QuestLink ,QuesSearchLink ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, UpdatedDatetime, 120) UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_D_Class WHERE TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher) AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(ClassDateS,11,2))=#ACYear#

/* '2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT d.Year ,d.PlanCode ,d.UnitCode ,d.TrainID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassName ,d.CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherID /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherName ,d.StudentID /*PK*/ ,d.StudentName ,d.PersonWorkExp ,d.DutyType ,d.FillDate /*PK*/ ,d.Q1,d.Q2,d.Q3,d.Q4,d.Q5,d.Q6,d.Q7,d.Q8,d.Q9,d.Q10,d.Q11 ,d.Suggest ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, d.UpdatedDatetime, 120) UpdatedDatetime ,b.ClassDateS /*PK*/ ,b.ClassDateE ,b.TrainingTimeS FROM TransData_S_Satisfy d JOIN TransData_S_Class b on d.Year=b.Year AND d.TrainID=b.TrainID AND d.ClassID=b.ClassID AND d.CourseUnitCode=b.CourseUnitCode AND d.TeacherID=b.TeacherID WHERE b.ClassDateS=#ClassDateS# and b.CourseUnitCode=#CourseUnitCode# and b.TeacherID=#TeacherID# AND b.TrainingTimeS=#TrainingTimeS#

/* '3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT d.Year ,d.PlanCode ,d.UnitCode ,d.TrainID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassName ,d.CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherID /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherName ,d.StudentID /*PK*/ ,d.StudentName ,d.PersonWorkExp ,d.DutyType ,d.FillDate /*PK*/ ,d.Q1,d.Q2,d.Q3,d.Q4,d.Q5,d.Q6,d.Q7,d.Q8,d.Q9,d.Q10,d.Q11 ,d.Suggest ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, d.UpdatedDatetime, 120) UpdatedDatetime ,b.ClassDateS /*PK*/ ,b.ClassDateE ,b.TrainingTimeS FROM TransData_K_Satisfy d JOIN TransData_K_Class b on d.Year=b.Year AND d.TrainID=b.TrainID AND d.ClassID=b.ClassID AND d.CourseUnitCode=b.CourseUnitCode AND d.TeacherID=b.TeacherID WHERE b.ClassDateS=#ClassDateS# and b.CourseUnitCode=#CourseUnitCode# and b.TeacherID=#TeacherID# AND b.TrainingTimeS=#TrainingTimeS#

/* '2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, MAX(UpdatedDatetime), 120) UpdatedDatetime ,MAX([Year]) Year ,MAX(PlanCode) PlanCode ,MAX(TrainID) TrainID ,MIN(ClassID) ClassID ,MAX(UnitCode) UnitCode ,MAX(UnitName) UnitName ,MAX(JoinCompany) JoinCompany ,MAX(TrainingUnit) TrainingUnit ,MAX(TrainingTimeE) TrainingTimeE ,MAX(ClassDateE) ClassDateE ,MAX(JobAbilityCode) JobAbilityCode ,MAX(TeachHours) TeachHours ,MAX(TeachNum) TeachNum ,MAX(QuestLink) QuestLink FROM TransData_S_Class WHERE Year=#Year# AND TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher) GROUP BY TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS

/* '3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, MAX(UpdatedDatetime), 120) UpdatedDatetime ,MAX([Year]) Year ,MAX(PlanCode) PlanCode ,MAX(TrainID) TrainID ,MIN(ClassID) ClassID ,MAX(UnitCode) UnitCode ,MAX(UnitName) UnitName ,MAX(JoinCompany) JoinCompany ,MAX(TrainingUnit) TrainingUnit ,MAX(TrainingTimeE) TrainingTimeE ,MAX(ClassDateE) ClassDateE ,MAX(JobAbilityCode) JobAbilityCode ,MAX(TeachHours) TeachHours ,MAX(TeachHours_X) TeachHours_X ,MAX(TeachNum) TeachNum ,MAX(QuestLink) QuestLink FROM TransData_K_Class WHERE Year=#Year# AND TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher) GROUP BY TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MeetingName, a.MeetingType, /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, ISNULL(a.MeetingDateS, ''), 111) + IIF(ISNULL(a.MeetingDateE, '') = '', '', ' ~ ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR, ISNULL(a.MeetingDateE, ''), 111)) AS MeetingDate*/ CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, a.Location, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120) AS SignUpDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120) AS SignUpDateE, a.CreatedUnit FROM Meeting a WHERE a.MeetingType='2'
AND a.MeetingType = #MeetingType# AND a.MeetingName LIKE '%' + #MeetingName# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 112) >= #MeetingDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 112) <= #MeetingDateE# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 112) >= #SignUpDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 112) <= #SignUpDateE# AND (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#CreatedUnit#, ',') WHERE value=a.CreatedUnit)>=1 AND (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#MeetLocated#, ',') WHERE CHARINDEX(value, a.Address)>=1)>=1 $IsSignUpStop_forSQL$
ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC

SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, a.MeetingType, a.MeetingName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, a.Days, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Location, a.Address, a.MaximumPeople, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS SignUpDateS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS SignUpDateE, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingRelease, 120) AS MeetingRelease, a.CreatedUnit, a.Remark, a.PicName, a.PicHint, a.PicAlign, a.CreatedAccount, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Meeting a WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MeetingSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MeetingAttached a WHERE a.MeetingSeq=#Seq#

SELECT a.Seq, CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) AS MeetingDate, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, a.CreatedUnit, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) + ' ~ ' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS MeetingTime, /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateS,*/ /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateE,*/ CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) AS SignUpDateTime, a.MeetingType, a.MeetingName, a.Location, a.MaximumPeople FROM Meeting a WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

WITH WC1 AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID ,a.Seq, a.MeetingSeq ,a.TeacherAccount,b.TeacherName ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDatetime, 120) AS SignUpDatetime ,a.SignUpType,a.UpdatedAccount ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MeetingSignUp a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE a.MeetingSeq=#Seq# ) SELECT * FROM WC1 WHERE ROWID >=#MINROW# AND ROWID <=#MAXROW#
statements.update: UPDATE Meeting SET Year = #Year#, MeetingType = #MeetingType#, MeetingName = #MeetingName#, MeetingDateS = #MeetingDateS#, MeetingDateE = #MeetingDateE#, MeetingRelease = #MeetingRelease#, Days = #Days#, TimeS = #TimeS#, TimeE = #TimeE#, Location = #Location#, PostalCode1 = #PostalCode1#, PostalCode2 = #PostalCode2#, Address = #Address#, MaximumPeople = #MaximumPeople#, SignUpDateS = #SignUpDateS#, SignUpDateE = #SignUpDateE#, Remark = #Remark#, PicName = #PicName#, PicHint = #PicHint#, PicAlign = #PicAlign#, /*SignUpState = #SignUpState#,*/ CreatedUnit = #CreatedUnit#, CreatedAccount = #CreatedAccount#, CreatedDatetime = #CreatedDatetime#, UpdatedAccount = #UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime = #UpdatedDatetime# WHERE Seq=#Seq#
statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.ACCOUNT AS TeacherAccount, a.TeacherName FROM Teacher a WHERE 1=1
AND a.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%' AND a.UnitCode = #UnitCode#
statements.delete: DELETE FROM MeetingAttend WHERE MeetingSeq = #MeetingSeq# AND TeacherAccount = #TeacherAccount#
statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MeetingName, a.MeetingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, a.Location FROM Meeting a WHERE a.MeetingType='2'
AND a.MeetingType = #MeetingType# AND a.MeetingName LIKE '%' + #MeetingName# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 112) >= #MeetingDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 112) <= #MeetingDateE# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 112) >= #SignUpDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 112) <= #SignUpDateE# AND (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#CreatedUnit#, ',') WHERE value=a.CreatedUnit)>=1 AND (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#MeetLocated#, ',') WHERE CHARINDEX(value, a.Address)>=1)>=1
ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC

SELECT a.Seq, CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) AS MeetingDate, /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS a.MeetingDateS,*/ /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS a.MeetingDateE,*/ SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) + ' ~ ' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS MeetingTime, /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateS,*/ /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateE,*/ CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) AS SignUpDateTime, a.MeetingType, a.MeetingName, a.Location, a.MaximumPeople FROM Meeting a WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

WITH WC1 AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID ,a.Seq,a.MeetingSeq ,a.TeacherAccount,b.TeacherName,c.UnitShortName AS UnitName ,a.Attend,a.TestPassed,a.TestScore,a.Remark ,a.UpdatedAccount,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MeetingAttend a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN Unit c ON b.UnitCode=c.UnitCode WHERE a.MeetingSeq=#Seq# ) SELECT * FROM WC1 WHERE ROWID >=#MINROW# AND ROWID <=#MAXROW#
statements.update: UPDATE MeetingAttend SET Attend = #Attend#, Remark = #Remark#, UpdatedAccount = #UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime = GETDATE() WHERE Seq=#Seq#
statements.select: SELECT COUNT(Seq) AS TeacherCount FROM Teacher WHERE Online='Y' AND DATEDIFF(DAY,CreatedDatetime,GETDATE())<=30

/* SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT IDNO) AS TeacherCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) AS TeacherCount ,COUNT(CASE WHEN UnitCode='1' THEN 1 END) TeacherCountUnit1 ,COUNT(CASE WHEN UnitCode='2' THEN 1 END) TeacherCountUnit2 ,COUNT(CASE WHEN UnitCode='3' THEN 1 END) TeacherCountUnit3 ,COUNT(CASE WHEN UnitCode='4' THEN 1 END) TeacherCountUnit4 ,COUNT(CASE WHEN UnitCode='5' THEN 1 END) TeacherCountUnit5 FROM Teacher WHERE Online='Y'
/* SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT IDNO) AS TeacherCount*/ SELECT COUNT(1) AS TeacherCount FROM Teacher WHERE Online='Y' AND UnitCode=#UnitCode#

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN TeachJobAbilityDC='Y' OR TeachJobAbilityBC='Y' OR TeachJobAbilityKC='Y' THEN 1 END) CNTX ,COUNT(CASE WHEN TeachJobAbilityDC='Y' THEN 1 END) DC ,COUNT(CASE WHEN TeachJobAbilityBC='Y' THEN 1 END) BC ,COUNT(CASE WHEN TeachJobAbilityKC='Y' THEN 1 END) KC ,COUNT(CASE WHEN IndustryAcademicType IN ('2','3','4','5') THEN 1 END) IAT2345 ,COUNT(CASE WHEN IndustryAcademicType='1' THEN 1 END) IAT1 FROM Teacher WHERE Online='Y'

SELECT SUM(IIF(TeachJobAbilityDC='Y',1,0)) AS DC, SUM(IIF(TeachJobAbilityBC='Y',1,0)) AS BC, SUM(IIF(TeachJobAbilityKC='Y',1,0)) AS KC FROM Teacher WHERE Online='Y' AND (TeachJobAbilityDC='Y' OR TeachJobAbilityBC='Y' OR TeachJobAbilityKC='Y') AND UnitCode=#UnitCode#
SELECT DISTINCT IDNO, IndustryAcademicType FROM Teacher WHERE Online='Y' AND IndustryAcademicType IS NOT NULL
SELECT DISTINCT IDNO, IndustryAcademicType FROM Teacher WHERE Online='Y' AND IndustryAcademicType IS NOT NULL AND UnitCode=#UnitCode#

SELECT a.JobAbilityCode, SUM(a.TeachHours) AS TeachHours FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=YEAR(GETDATE()) AND a.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode=#UnitCode#) GROUP BY a.JobAbilityCode

WITH WT2 AS (SELECT a.TeacherID,a.TeacherName,a.ClassName,a.CourseUnitCode,a.ClassDateS ,MAX(a.JobAbilityCode) JobAbilityCode ,MAX(a.TeachHours) TeachHours FROM TransData_S_Class a WHERE a.Year=YEAR(GETDATE()) AND a.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode=#UnitCode#) GROUP BY a.TeacherID,a.TeacherName,a.ClassName,a.CourseUnitCode,a.ClassDateS) SELECT w.JobAbilityCode, SUM(w.TeachHours) AS TeachHours FROM WT2 w GROUP BY w.JobAbilityCode

SELECT a.JobAbilityCode, SUM(a.TeachHours) AS TeachHours FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=YEAR(GETDATE()) AND a.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher) GROUP BY a.JobAbilityCode

WITH WT2 AS ( SELECT a.TeacherID,a.TeacherName,a.ClassName,a.CourseUnitCode,a.ClassDateS ,MAX(a.JobAbilityCode) JobAbilityCode ,MAX(a.TeachHours) TeachHours FROM TransData_S_Class a WHERE a.Year=YEAR(GETDATE()) AND a.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher) GROUP BY a.TeacherID,a.TeacherName,a.ClassName,a.CourseUnitCode,a.ClassDateS) SELECT w.JobAbilityCode ,SUM(w.TeachHours) AS TeachHours FROM WT2 w GROUP BY w.JobAbilityCode

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UnitCode, a.TeacherName) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, (select b.EduName from Edu b WHERE a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel) AS EduLevelHighest_Name, (select c1.EduName from Edu c1 WHERE a.EduLevel1=c1.EduLevel) AS EduLevel1_Name, (select c2.EduName from Edu c2 WHERE a.EduLevel2=c2.EduLevel) AS EduLevel2_Name, (select c3.EduName from Edu c3 WHERE a.EduLevel3=c3.EduLevel) AS EduLevel3_Name, (SELECT bb.ExpertiseName + ',' FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.ExpertiseCode, ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS Expertise_Str, (SELECT aa.IndustryName + ',' FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) FOR XML PATH('')) AS IndustryStr, a.IndustryAcademicType, a.ServiceUnitProperties FROM Teacher a WHERE 1=1
AND a.UnitCode = #Unit# AND a.Online = #Online#
ORDER BY a.UnitCode, a.TeacherName

SELECT a.Seq, a.Caption, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateS, 120) AS DateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateE, 120) AS DateE, a.IsOnTop, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Notices a WHERE 1=1
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.DateS, 112) >= #DateS_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.DateS, 112) <= #DateS_B# AND a.Caption LIKE '%' + #KeyWord# + '%'
ORDER BY a.IsOnTop DESC, a.DateS DESC, a.DateE DESC, a.Caption

SELECT a.Seq, a.NoticesSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM NoticesAttached a WHERE a.NoticesSeq=#Seq#

SELECT ds.Year,ds.PlanCode,ds.UnitCode,ds.PlanID ,ds.ClassName,ds.CourseUnitCode ,ds.TeacherID,ds.TeacherName ,ds.StudentID,ds.StudentName ,ds.Dept,ds.[Identity],ds.FillDate ,ds.Q1,ds.Q2,ds.Q3,ds.Q4 ,ds.Q5,ds.Q6,ds.Q7,ds.Q8 ,ds.Q9,ds.Q10,ds.Q11 ,ds.Suggest ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), ds.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2)) ACTUALYEAR FROM TransData_D_Class a JOIN TransData_D_Satisfy ds on ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID WHERE dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=#ACTUALYEAR#

SELECT ds.Year,ds.PlanCode,ds.UnitCode ,ds.TrainID,ds.ClassID ,ds.ClassName,ds.CourseUnitCode ,ds.TeacherID ,ds.TeacherName ,ds.StudentID ,ds.StudentName ,ds.PersonWorkExp,ds.DutyType,ds.FillDate ,ds.Q1,ds.Q2,ds.Q3,ds.Q4 ,ds.Q5,ds.Q6,ds.Q7,ds.Q8 ,ds.Q9,ds.Q10,ds.Q11 ,ds.Suggest ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), ds.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_S_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=#Year#

SELECT ds.Year,ds.PlanCode,ds.UnitCode ,ds.TrainID,ds.ClassID ,ds.ClassName,ds.CourseUnitCode ,ds.TeacherID ,ds.TeacherName ,ds.StudentID ,ds.StudentName ,ds.PersonWorkExp,ds.DutyType,ds.FillDate ,ds.Q1,ds.Q2,ds.Q3,ds.Q4 ,ds.Q5,ds.Q6,ds.Q7,ds.Q8 ,ds.Q9,ds.Q10,ds.Q11 ,ds.Suggest ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), ds.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_K_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=#Year#
